welcomeMessage:
🎬 *WELCOME TO VIDEO DOWNLOADER BOT* 🎬

Send me any video link from the platforms below and I'll download it for you!

*Supported Platforms:*
• YouTube
• Instagram
• Facebook
• TikTok
• X (Twitter)

*How to use:*
1️⃣ Send me a video link
2️⃣ Choose quality (1080p/720p/480p)
3️⃣ Download immediately!

*Commands:*
!menu - Show this menu
!help - Show all commands
!status - Bot status

*Note:* Videos available for ~30 days. Save to gallery to keep forever.
disclaimer:
⚠️ *DISCLAIMER* ⚠️

This bot downloads videos from public URLs only.

• Videos are available in this chat for approximately 30 days
• Save videos to your gallery to keep them forever
• Don't clear this chat or videos will be deleted
• I don't store any videos on my servers

For issues or suggestions, contact admin.
